steps.name: operator-command-inventory
steps.summary: OEH1 added scripts/operator_command_inventory.py, tests/test_operator_command_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-oeh1-operator-command-inventory.md. It inventories 8 operator-facing commands across quality, trust, controlled source, workflow, retriever promotion, progress, weakness queue, and operator-hardening goals with report links and safety notes.

steps.name: run-doctor-and-environment-checks
steps.summary: OEH2 added scripts/operator_run_doctor.py, tests/test_operator_run_doctor.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-oeh2-run-doctor.md. It checks Python, uv availability, required public reports, missing report rerun hints, and protected-data boundaries without reading private payloads, embedding dumps, or dogfood material.

steps.name: report-manifest-and-navigation-surface
steps.summary: OEH3 added scripts/operator_report_manifest.py, tests/test_operator_report_manifest.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-oeh3-report-manifest.md. It creates an ordered public report navigation surface from progress and horizon queue through command inventory, run doctor, retriever close, workflow close, and source lane close reports without protected data paths.

steps.name: error-recovery-playbook
steps.summary: OEH4 added scripts/operator_error_recovery.py, tests/test_operator_error_recovery.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-oeh4-error-recovery-playbook.md. It maps pytest failure, missing report, default retriever guard failure, protected data warning, and navigation drift to specific rerun/remediation commands without destructive cleanup.
